title: TimberTweaks
description: 🌲This texture pack was made in a simplistic vanilla theme with the goal to add light weight changes such as new music disc music, cleaner crosshair and a darkened/leafy GUI. more saturated (colorful) texture colors and ETF and EMF mob support.🌲
body:
🌿🌲This texture pack is a combination of aspects of other texture packs I like along with **original aspects**. In no way is this texture pack meant to copy other people's work this is simply a combination of texture pack aspects that I liked and put into one pack. Credits are given where due, and I have high regard for all the original creators.🌲🌿 

(don't ask what happened to V3)


![^-^](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1080685cd9f24495b8290eab28e4268d30d9f94.png)
